This installs Mavericks Trackpad 2, a driver that makes your Apple Magic Trackpad 2 work on OS X 10.9 Mavericks — cursor, scrolling, and the full set of multi‑touch gestures, over both USB and Bluetooth.

Why the installer asks for your administrator password: the driver is a kernel extension — a low‑level system component that communicates with the trackpad hardware. Installing a kernel extension requires administrator privileges. It is used only to drive your trackpad.

This installer requires OS X 10.9.5 or later.
